body:
Hey Amara, hope your January is off to a good start — I know this time of year can be a bit of a blur with everyone coming back from the holidays and deal flow suddenly picking back up at once. I wanted to reach out because I've been tracking a company called [Verdant Grid](companies/verdant-grid) that's doing some genuinely interesting work at the intersection of grid optimization and machine learning, and I immediately thought of you given [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital)'s thesis around climate and AI infrastructure. They're raising a seed round right now and the founders have a strong technical background out of NREL and DeepMind, which seems like exactly the profile you'd want to see. I'm not leading this one given our stage focus at Khosla at this point in the round, but I think it could be a strong fit for your portfolio and I'd love to make a warm intro if you're open to it. Let me know if you'd like me to send over their deck first or if you'd rather just jump on a quick call with the team.

Tomoko
